case_title: YU MENG HOGAN VS. DANIELLE LANE

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MONCRIEF, PAUL SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR CREDIT CONSULTING SERVICES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-12-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-12-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF YUMENG HOGAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANIELLE LANE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOGAN, YU MENG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANE, DANIELLE $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $820.00, REFERRAL BONUS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY HOGAN, YU MENG AS TO DEFENDANT LANE, DANIELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40.00) SERVED AUG-12-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LANE, DANIELLE
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR HOGAN, YU MENG ASSIGNED TO CREDIT CONSULTING SERVICES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2021 - JUDGMENT.
